epic.name: Prometheus Webhook Ingestion
epic.objective: Receive and process Prometheus Alertmanager webhooks, store alerts, and trigger incident creation
epic.definition_of_done: Alertmanager can POST to /api/v1/webhooks/prometheus, alerts are stored with proper parsing, and critical/warning alerts auto-create incidents

tasks.name: Define Alertmanager webhook payload structs
tasks.description: Create Go structs matching Prometheus Alertmanager webhook JSON format
acceptance_criteria: AlertmanagerPayload struct with receiver, status, alerts array, groupLabels, commonLabels, commonAnnotations, externalURL
AlertmanagerAlert struct with status, labels, annotations, startsAt, endsAt, generatorURL, fingerprint
JSON tags match Alertmanager field names exactly
Time fields properly parse ISO8601 format

tasks.name: Implement Prometheus webhook handler
tasks.description: Create HTTP handler for POST /api/v1/webhooks/prometheus that receives and validates Alertmanager payloads
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/webhooks/prometheus endpoint registered
Request body parsed into AlertmanagerPayload struct
Validation rejects malformed payloads with 400 status
Returns 200 with JSON response: {received: N, incidents_created: M}
Logs receipt of webhook with alert count

tasks.name: Implement alert parsing and normalization service
tasks.description: Create service that transforms Alertmanager alerts into internal Alert model
acceptance_criteria: Maps alertname label to title
Maps summary/description annotations to description
Maps severity label to severity enum (defaults to warning if missing)
Preserves all labels and annotations as JSONB
Stores complete raw payload
Uses fingerprint as external_id
Sets source to 'prometheus'

tasks.name: Implement alert deduplication
tasks.description: Check for existing alert by source + external_id before creating, update if exists
acceptance_criteria: If alert with same (source, external_id) exists, update status and ended_at
If alert is new, create with received_at = NOW()
Deduplication is atomic (no race conditions)
Returns whether alert was created or updated

tasks.name: Implement incident auto-creation service
tasks.description: Create service that evaluates alerts and creates incidents for critical/warning severity
acceptance_criteria: Critical severity alerts always create incident
Warning severity alerts always create incident
Info severity alerts do not create incident
Incident title derived from alert title
Incident slug generated from title (URL-safe, max 50 chars)
Incident severity matches alert severity (critical->critical, warning->high)
Alert is linked to created incident via incident_alerts
Timeline entry created: type=incident_created, content={trigger: 'alert', alert_id: '...'}

tasks.name: Add webhook request logging and metrics
tasks.description: Log all webhook requests with timing and add basic metrics
acceptance_criteria: Log entry for each webhook: timestamp, alert_count, processing_time_ms, incidents_created
Counter metric: openincident_webhooks_received_total{source='prometheus'}
Counter metric: openincident_alerts_processed_total{source='prometheus', status='firing|resolved'}
Histogram metric: openincident_webhook_processing_duration_seconds
